posts.author: blandjc (Janel Bland)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Can I wrap text in the Item Card? When someone creates a help ticket, I can’t see all the text submitted without hovering over each field. I would like to be able to see more of the information in the item card similar to Jira tickets.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to be able to see more of the text information in the item card similar to Jira tickets.
